scripts.redeploy:prod: node -e "const hook = process.env.VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL; if (!hook) { console.error('Missing VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL'); process.exit(1); } const url = new URL(hook); url.searchParams.set('buildCache', 'false'); fetch(url, { method: 'POST' }).then(async (res) => { const text = await res.text(); if (!res.ok) { console.error(text || res.statusText); process.exit(1); } console.log(text || 'Redeploy triggered'); }).catch((err) => { console.error(err); process.exit(1); });"
